title: Waterfall Giant

moves.title: About to Blow
effects: Store accumulated Steam Eruption stack count as eruption damage

moves.title: Explode
effects: Deal damage equal to accumulated Steam Eruption stacks

move_pattern: Starts with Pressurize. Then cycles: Stomp → Ram → Siphon → Pressure Gun → Pressure Up → back to Stomp. After completing the first full 6-move cycle (Pressurize through Pressure Up), an external trigger fires: the monster becomes invincible (HP set to infinite), performs About to Blow once, then loops on Explode.
notes: Each move builds up Steam Eruption on the Waterfall Giant: Pressurize adds 20 stacks; every other move adds 3 stacks. After 6 total moves (one full cycle), the fight transitions: TriggerAboutToBlowState() is called externally, making the monster's HP effectively infinite. About to Blow saves the accumulated Steam Eruption stack count as eruption damage and removes the power; Explode then deals that full amount to all players before the monster dies. Pressure Gun starts at 23 damage and increases by 5 each time it is used (second use: 28, third use: 33, etc.). Siphon heals 15 HP per player, scaling in multiplayer. The monster only fades on death if no pressure has built up (PressureBuildupIdx == 0). Doom does not affect this monster while it has Steam Eruption stacks.
